CREATE TABLE my_project.my_table (id INT, name TEXT);
CREATE VIEW my_project.my_View AS SELECT * FROM my_project.my_table;
DROP VIEW IF EXISTS my_project.my_View CASCADE;
CREATE VIEW my_project.my_View_2 AS SELECT id, name FROM my_project.my_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL;
DROP VIEW IF EXISTS my_project.my_View_2 CASCADE;
CREATE VIEW my_project.my_View_3 AS SELECT t1.id, t2.name FROM my_project.my_table t1 JOIN my_project.my_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
CREATE VIEW my_project.my_View_IF_EXISTS AS SELECT * FROM my_project.my_table;
DROP VIEW IF EXISTS my_project.my_View_IF_EXISTS RESTRICT;
CREATE VIEW my_project.another_view AS SELECT id FROM my_project.my_table WHERE id > 10;
CREATE VIEW complex_view AS SELECT * FROM my_project.my_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM my_project.my_table WHERE name LIKE 'A%');
DROP VIEW IF EXISTS complex_view RESTRICT;
